titleStmt.title: SII 16.280: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 280. (A.R. No. 43 of 1915.) ŚRĪŚAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near a tank west of the Mallikārjuna temple.
This is dated Śaka 1496, Bhāva, Vaiśākha ba. 30, Thursday, corresponding to 1574 A.D., May 20.

It states that Dantikaṇṭi Liṅgappaṇṇa, the kāryakarta of Rāmarājayyadēva Mahārāju, who was the son of Tirumaladēva Mahārāja, having repiared the bund across the Bhōgavatī to the west of the prākāra of the Mallikārjuna temple, at the command of his preceptor Vīraśaiva-Śāntabhikshāvṛitti-ayya for the merit of his teachers and parents, had the goddess Bhōgavatī onsecrated on the tank bund by Savaram Basvappa, the mudra officer of the king and Gaṅginēni Gaṅgappa, his own mudra officer, and endowed a garden near the tank for the daily supply of flowers to god Mallikārjuna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka
va¨rṣaṁbulu 1496 Agunēṭi bhāva saṁvatsara vaiśākha
ba 30 guruvāraṁ śrīpa¨rvataṁmīda śrī mallikā¨rjunadēvuni prākāraṁ
kōṭa paḍamaṭanu bhōgāvatīnadiki puvā na kaṭina kaṭa khilamayi nī
ru nilvakapōṁgānu śrīvīraśaivaśāṁtta bhikṣāvritti Ayyavāru Āna
tina . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra
tirumaladēvamahārāyaluṁgāri komāruṁ
ḍu rāmarājayyadēva mahārājulayyavāri kārya
ka¨rtalaina daṁtikaṁṭi liṁgapaṇagāru Ā bhōgāvatī kaṭa puna
ruddhāraṇaṁgā kaṭukāluvalu tī¨rpiṁci tama guruvu
lakuṁnu tama talidaṁḍrādulakuṁnu puṇyaṁgānu puna
pratiṣṭa rāmarājayyavāri mudra savaraṁ basvappanunnu
tama mudra gaṁginēni gaṁgappanunnu Aṁpi śēyiṁcina
bhōgavatīpunapratiṣṭa Ā kaṭamīdanu cerlōnu sadā
gānu śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvuniki puvvalatōṁṭa
ku Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastāIgānu sama¨rpiṁcināraṁ gana
ka yavurai nānu rājulanu tagilikāni
tama svaIcchagāni tōṁṭa tīsukonaṭāyanā ta
ma guruvulānu tamatallidaṁḍrādulānu kāsī
lō gaṁgātīramaṁdu gōbrāhmaṇavatha cē
śina pāpāna pōvuvāru . svadattā dviguṇa
ṁpuṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . parada
ttāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bha
vēt . śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
